query:
SELECT id, title, documentType, 
  CASE WHEN fileUrl IS NOT NULL AND fileUrl != '' THEN 'HAS_URL' ELSE 'NO_URL' END as has_url,
  CASE WHEN content IS NOT NULL AND content != '' THEN 'HAS_CONTENT' ELSE 'NO_CONTENT' END as has_content,
  LENGTH(content) as content_length
FROM secure_documents 
ORDER BY has_url, title;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user nC6sHo9eqXDn4Lp.root --database SPWUc63a3tjYuzCxiuEomB --execute SELECT id, title, documentType, 
  CASE WHEN fileUrl IS NOT NULL AND fileUrl != '' THEN 'HAS_URL' ELSE 'NO_URL' END as has_url,
  CASE WHEN content IS NOT NULL AND content != '' THEN 'HAS_CONTENT' ELSE 'NO_CONTENT' END as has_content,
  LENGTH(content) as content_length
FROM secure_documents 
ORDER BY has_url, title;
